allow: Bash(node -e "const lr = require\('./node_modules/lucide-react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(lr\); console.log\('Total exports:', keys.length\); console.log\('Has AppWindow:', 'AppWindow' in lr\); console.log\('Has Home:', 'Home' in lr\); console.log\('Has Wind:', 'Wind' in lr\); console.log\('Has Layers:', 'Layers' in lr\); console.log\('Has Trees:', 'Trees' in lr\); console.log\('Has PaintBucket:', 'PaintBucket' in lr\);")

Bash(node -e "const pj = require\('./node_modules/lucide-react/package.json'\); console.log\('name:', pj.name\); console.log\('version:', pj.version\); console.log\('description:', pj.description\);")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); console.log\('LucideIcon:', typeof l.LucideIcon\); console.log\('keys with Icon/Type:', Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => /Icon|Props|Type/.test\(k\)\).slice\(0, 10\)\)")
